•••How to Get Your Fingerprint••• 
You need the following: 
1.  Post It or Some Type of Bright Paper
2.  Pencil 
3. Clear Tape
4. Last but not least some Fingers :)

Instructions:
1.  First, you want to draw on the post-it or paper until the small surface is dark.
2. Then rub the finger you want to "print" hard on the post-it until its all black.
3. Take the clear piece of tape and put on the finger and rub.
4. Now Stick the tape on another post-it or paper. 

If you need further instructions please contact us.

Tungsten is about 10 times harder than gold which makes this metal a top priority when searching for a more scratch-resistant product from which a wedding band can be made. Why is this important to you? a ring that has very few if any scratches look new, all the time. Some even refer to this metal as the one with the “permanent shine”. Have you ever seen a gold or silver ring that is more than 3 years old and how it looks? In most cases, it looks older than it really is because of the dents, scratches, and wears marks. This happens to Sterling Silver, White Gold, Yellow Gold, and Rose gold metals.

Whether you are looking at wedding bands or just a stylish ring to compliment your look, pass on the platinum and gold. Tungsten carbide rings are trending right now. They are strong, durable, scratch-proof, which appeals to men. Tungsten rings come in many different finishes and they look masculine. Tungsten ring has a weighty feel to them making them look sophisticated and feel expensive even though they are very wallet-friendly. Tungsten rings are so popular right now that there are many styles to choose from. If you are looking to buy a tungsten ring, you can’t go wrong with our tungsten ring designs we have to offer for men & women.

•••How to Get Your Fingerprint••• 
You need the following: 
1.  Post It or Some Type of Bright Paper
2.  Pencil 
3. Clear Tape
4. Last but not least some Fingers :)

Instructions:
1.  First, you want to draw on the post-it or paper until the small surface is dark.
2. Then rub the finger you want to "print" hard on the post-it until its all black.
3. Take the clear piece of tape and put on the finger and rub.
4. Now Stick the tape on another post-it or paper.

•••About Aydin's Ceramic Wedding Rings•••
Most ceramic rings and jewelry are made from titanium carbide, which is sometimes referred to as high-tech ceramic or jewelry ceramic and is a material composed of the metal titanium and a similar number of carbon atoms. Ceramic jewelry can be created with these materials but there are other materials that are also classed as ceramics. High-tech ceramics such as titanium carbide and tungsten carbide are often used for rings and other jewelry. Carbide ceramics have high melting points which make them very strong and durable. Most rings will have to be cut off, but tough materials like tungsten carbide and ceramic rings will need to be "cracked off" rather than cut off.

•••About Aydin's Ceramic Wedding Rings•••

Most ceramic rings and jewelry are made from titanium carbide, which is sometimes also referred to as high tech ceramic or jewelry ceramic and is a material composed of the metal titanium and a similar number of carbon atoms. Ceramic jewelry can be created with these materials but there are other materials which are also classed as ceramics. High-tech ceramic such as titanium carbide and tungsten carbide are often used for rings and other jewelry. Carbide ceramics have high melting points which make them very strong and durable. 3. Take the clear piece of tape and put on the finger and rub.
4. Now Stick the tape on another post it or paper.

Most ceramic rings and jewelry are made from titanium carbide, which is sometimes also referred to as high tech ceramic or jewelry ceramic and is a material composed of the metal titanium and a similar number of carbon atoms. •••How to Get Your Fingerprint••• 
You need the following: 
1.  Post It or Some Type of Bright Paper
2.  Pencil 
3. Clear Tape
4. Last but not least some Fingers :)

Instructions:
1.  First, you want to draw on the post-it or paper until the small surface is dark.
2. Then rub the finger you want to "print" hard on the post-it until its all black.
3. Take the clear piece of tape and put on the finger and rub.
4. Now Stick the tape on another post-it or paper.

•••How to Get Your Fingerprint••• 
You need the Following: 
1.  Post It or Some Type of Bright Paper
2. Pencil 
3. Clear Tape
4. Last but not least some Fingers :)

Instructions:
1.  First you want to draw on the post it or paper until the small surface is dark.
2. Then rub the finger you want to "print" hard on the post it until its all black.
3. Take the clear piece of tape and put on the finger and rub.
4. Now Stick the tape on another post it or paper.

•••About Aydin's Ceramic Wedding Rings•••

Most ceramic rings and jewelry are made from titanium carbide, which is sometimes also referred to as high tech ceramic or jewelry ceramic and is a material composed of the metal titanium and a similar number of carbon atoms. Ceramic jewelry can be created with these materials but there are other materials which are also classed as ceramics. High-tech ceramic such as titanium carbide and tungsten carbide are often used for rings and other jewelry. Carbide ceramics have high melting points which make them very strong and durable. Most rings will have to be cut off, but extremely hard materials like tungsten carbide and ceramic rings will need to be "cracked off" rather than cut off.

•••How to Get Your Fingerprint••• 
You need the following: 
1.  Post It or Some Type of Bright Paper
2.  Pencil 
3. Clear Tape
4. Last but not least some Fingers :)

Instructions:
1.  First, you want to draw on the post-it or paper until the small surface is dark.
2. Then rub the finger you want to "print" hard on the post-it until its all black.
3. Take the clear piece of tape and put on the finger and rub.
4. Now Stick the tape on another post-it or paper.

•••About Aydin's Tungsten Carbide Rings•••

Tungsten is extremely durable and is known as one of the hardest metals on the earth. Tungsten is about 10 times harder than gold which makes this metal a top priority when searching for a more scratch-resistant product from which a wedding band can be made. Why is this important to you? a ring that has very few if any scratches look new, all the time. Some even refer to this metal as the one with the “permanent shine”. Have you ever seen a gold or silver ring that is more than 3 years old and how it looks? In most cases, it looks older than it really is because of the dents, scratches, and wears marks. This happens to Sterling Silver, White Gold, Yellow Gold, and Rose gold metals.

Whether you are looking at wedding bands or just a stylish ring to compliment your look, pass on the platinum and gold. Tungsten carbide rings are trending right now. They are strong, durable, scratch-proof, which appeals to men. Tungsten rings come in many different finishes and they look masculine. Tungsten ring has a weighty feel to them making them look sophisticated and feel expensive even though they are very wallet-friendly. Tungsten rings are so popular right now that there are many styles to choose from. If you are looking to buy a tungsten ring, you can’t go wrong with the tungsten ring designs we have to offer for men & women.

•••About Aydin's Tungsten Carbide Rings•••

Tungsten is extremely durable and is known as one of the hardest metals on the earth. •••How to Get Your Fingerprint••• 
You need the Following: 
1.  Post It or Some Type of Bright Paper
2. Pencil 
3. Clear Tape
4. Last but not least some Fingers :)

Instructions:
1.  First you want to draw on the post it or paper until the small surface is dark.
2. Then rub the finger you want to "print" hard on the post it until its all black.
3. Take the clear piece of tape and put on the finger and rub.
4. Now Stick the tape on another post it or paper. 

If you need further instructions please contact us.

•••About Aydin's Tungsten Carbide Rings•••

Tungsten is extremely durable and is known as one of the hardest metals on the earth. Tungsten is about 10 times harder than gold which makes this metal a top priority when searching for a more scratch-resistant product from which a wedding band can be made. Why is this important to you? a ring that has very few if any scratches look new, all the time. Some even refer to this metal as the one with the “permanent shine”. Have you ever seen a gold or silver ring that is more than 3 years old and how it looks? In most cases, it looks older that it really is because of the dents, scratches and wears marks. This happens to Sterling Silver, White Gold, Yellow gold, and Rose gold metals.

Whether you are looking at wedding bands or just a stylish ring to compliment your look, pass on the platinum and gold. Tungsten carbide rings are trending right now. They are strong, durable, scratch-proof, which appeals to men. Tungsten rings come in many different finishes and they look masculine. Tungsten ring has a weighty feel to them making them look sophisticated and feel expensive even though they are very wallet friendly. Tungsten rings are so popular right now that there are many styles to choose from. If you are looking to buy a tungsten ring, you can’t go wrong with our tungsten ring designs we have to offer for men & women.

•••About Aydin's Tungsten Carbide Rings•••

Tungsten is extremely durable and is known as one of the hardest metals on the earth. Tungsten is about 10 times harder than gold which makes this metal a top priority when searching for a more scratch-resistant product from which a wedding band can be made. Why is this important to you? a ring that has very few if any scratches look new, all the time. Some even refer to this metal as the one with the “permanent shine”. Have you ever seen a gold or silver ring that is more than 3 years old and how it looks? In most cases, it looks older than it really is because of the dents, scratches, and wears marks. This happens to Sterling Silver, White Gold, Yellow Gold, and Rose gold metals.

Whether you are looking at wedding bands or just a stylish ring to compliment your look, pass on the platinum and gold. Tungsten carbide rings are trending right now. They are strong, durable, scratch-proof, which appeals to men. Tungsten rings come in many different finishes and they look masculine. Tungsten ring has a weighty feel to them making them look sophisticated and feel expensive even though they are very wallet-friendly. Tungsten rings are so popular right now that there are many styles to choose from. If you are looking to buy a tungsten ring, you can’t go wrong with our tungsten ring designs we have to offer for men & women.

•••About Aydin's Ceramic Wedding Rings•••
Most ceramic rings and jewelry are made from titanium carbide, which is sometimes also referred to as high tech ceramic or jewelry ceramic and is a material composed of the metal titanium and a similar number of carbon atoms. Ceramic jewelry can be created with these materials but there are other materials which are also classed as ceramics. High-tech ceramic such as titanium carbide and tungsten carbide are often used for rings and other jewelry. Carbide ceramics have high melting points which make them very strong and durable. Most rings will have to be cut off, but extremely hard materials like tungsten carbide and ceramic rings will need to be "cracked off" rather than cut off.

•••How to Get Your Fingerprint••• 
You need the Following: 
1.  Post It or Some Type of Bright Paper
2. Pencil 
3. Clear Tape
4. Last but not least some Fingers :)

Instructions:
1.  First you want to draw on the post it or paper until the small surface is dark.
2. Then rub the finger you want to "print" hard on the post it until its all black.
3. Take the clear piece of tape and put on the finger and rub.
4. Now Stick the tape on another post it or paper. 

If you need further instructions please contact us.
